overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a tropical environment. The character walks through shallow water along a palm-lined riverbank, enters a narrow rocky canyon, and emerges into an open valley with ancient ruins visible in the distance.

events.description: character exits shallow water and steps onto rocky shore at the canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water along the tropical riverbank, heading toward denser vegetation

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the riverbank against the sky
clear shallow water covering the ground where the character walks
sandy and rocky shoreline along the edge of the water
dense green bushes and plants along the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit tropical river surrounded by tall palm trees and dense vegetation. The shallow water creates ripples as the character moves forward, with sandy banks visible on either side. The environment is bright and open with clear skies overhead.

events.description: scene transitions to narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff walls on both sides
lighting becomes significantly darker as character moves deeper into the shadowed canyon

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow dirt path between high rocky cliff walls alongside a flowing stream

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered with vines and moss forming the left canyon wall
steep rock wall rising on the right side with hanging vegetation
narrow flowing water channel running alongside the path
natural rock formation creating an archway overhead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow canyon with steep rocky walls that block most of the sky, creating a shadowed environment. A stream flows along the right side of the dirt path while vines and moss cover the cliff faces. The space feels enclosed and sheltered compared to the open riverbank.

events.description: exits the narrow canyon into a wider open valley with ancient tower ruins visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward ancient ruins visible in the distance across open grassy terrain

entered.detail: tall stone tower structure of ancient ruins visible in the distance ahead
open grassy areas replacing the dense canyon vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon into a wide open valley where an ancient stone tower stands visible in the distance. The terrain opens up with grassy areas and scattered rocks, and the lighting becomes brighter as the sky becomes visible again. The stream continues alongside the path but appears wider as the landscape expands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright tropical riverbank through a shadowed canyon and into a vast open valley. It begins with the character wading through shallow, rippling water beneath tall palm trees and a clear, sunlit sky. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a sheltered canyon where steep rocky walls block the light and mossy vines cling to the cliffs. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the enclosure, causing the landscape to expand into a wide valley under a brightening sky. Finally, the terrain opens up into grassy plains with a widening stream, revealing an ancient stone tower standing in the far distance.
